Full 13-file acceleration_cards/ tree read. Structural template identified (platform → Dockerfile recipe → docker run → 🟢🟡🔴 support matrix → VISIBLE_DEVICES tips). Outliers: AMD (community Triton patches), VastAI (pinned to 2.7.0, vlm-only). Captured in Appendix §A1 and kno-mineru-008.

All 13 read: AMD, Ascend, Biren, Cambricon, Enflame, Hygon, IluvatarCorex, Kunlunxin, METAX, MooreThreads, Tecorigin, THead, VastAI. Support matrix data is the real value — English README provides none of it. Structural anti-pattern (i18n parity) retained as anti-mineru-004.

All 11 Dockerfiles + compose.yaml read. Multi-vendor base-image pattern captured in Appendix §A3-A5 and kno-mineru-007 (T3). compose.yaml binds all services to 0.0.0.0 — reinforces HTTP security concern (anti-mineru-002).
